description: A local-style representative meal for this rest stop.
Sweet soy-marinated beef over rice.
Crispy pork cutlet with rice and sauce.
Hot kimchi stew served with rice.
Warm udon soup for quick meals.
Simple spicy ramen.
Spicy rice cakes in a cup.
Classic highway snack.
Small sweet pastry snack.
Cold coffee drink.
Soft bread with red bean filling.
Basic bottled water.
